text:
Irish boxer Kellie Harrington put on a show for fans in Stade Roland Garros after her stunning gold medal victory in the women's lightweight final last night, celebrating with a ringside song.

The Dublin boxer won back-to-back gold medals after coming out on top in the same event in the Tokyo Olympics.

She beat China’s Yang Wenlu in the gold medal bout to secure victory in the Paris games.

After an emotional medal ceremony, and with many Team Ireland fans still in the stadium long after the event was over, she broke into song and serenaded the green-clad crowd with a rendition of 'Grace'.

Many of the fans can be heard in this footage singing along at the impromptu afterparty

title: Watch: Harrington bows out with sing-song after medal win
description: Irish boxer Kellie Harrington put on a show for fans in Stade Roland Garros after her stunning gold medal victory in the women's lightweight final last night, celebrating with a ringside song.
